Emberstaff.name: 余烬法杖 Emberstaff
Emberstaff.description:
这根焦黑的树枝永远闷燃着余烬，并被一层薄薄的木炭所包覆。木炭会弄黑任何握持者的手，但也让法杖的持用者能够用它在纸张、石头及其他光滑表面上绘画。

启动 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{施放法术}

效果 你从法杖中消耗一定数量的充能，以从其列表中施放一个法术。

  • 戏法 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.O9w7r4BKgPogYDDe]{Produce Flame}
  • 1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Burning Hands}
  • 2环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.23cv1p49NFd0Onng]{Ash Cloud}，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Burning Hands}，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3q9tBMWsWQKlXPPJ]{Flame 鬼火}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZxHC7V7HtjUsB8zH]{Blazing Bolt}

制造需求 提供施放所有列出法术的所有列出等级各一次。

This blackened branch perpetually smolders with embers and is enveloped in a thin layer of charcoal. The charcoal blackens the hands of whoever holds it, but also lets the staff’s wielder use it to draw on paper, stone and other smooth surfaces.

Activate @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast a Spell}

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • Cantrip @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.O9w7r4BKgPogYDDe]{Produce Flame}
  • 1st @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Burning Hands}
  • 2nd @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.23cv1p49NFd0Onng]{Ash Cloud}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Burning Hands}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3q9tBMWsWQKlXPPJ]{Flame Wisp}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZxHC7V7HtjUsB8zH]{Blazing Bolt}

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.

Emberstaff (Greater).name: 余烬法杖（强效） Emberstaff (Greater)
Emberstaff (Greater).description:
这根焦黑的树枝永远闷燃着余烬，外覆一层薄薄的木炭。木炭会把任何握持它之人的双手染黑，但也让法杖的持用者可以用它在纸张、石头和其他光滑表面上作画。

启动 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{施放法术}

效果 你从法杖中消耗一定数量的充能，以从其列表中施放一个法术。

  • 戏法 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.O9w7r4BKgPogYDDe]{Produce Flame}
  • 1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Burning Hands}
  • 2环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.23cv1p49NFd0Onng]{Ash Cloud}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Burning Hands}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3q9tBMWsWQKlXPPJ]{Flame Wisp}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZxHC7V7HtjUsB8zH]{Blazing Bolt}
  • 3环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.23cv1p49NFd0Onng]{Ash Cloud}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KEkPxx7Sm6Xf4W3s]{Blazing Dive}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZxHC7V7HtjUsB8zH]{Blazing Bolt}
  • 4环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.23cv1p49NFd0Onng]{Ash Cloud}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KEkPxx7Sm6Xf4W3s]{Blazing Dive}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3q9tBMWsWQKlXPPJ]{Flame Wisp}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZxHC7V7HtjUsB8zH]{Blazing Bolt}

制作需求 提供所有所列法术中所有所列环阶各一次的施放。

Activate @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{Cast a Spell}

  • 2nd @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.23cv1p49NFd0Onng]{Ash Cloud}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{Burning Hands}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3q9tBMWsWQKlXPPJ]{Flame Wisp}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZxHC7V7HtjUsB8zH]{Blazing Bolt}

Earthrune.name: 大地符文 Earthrune
Earthrune.description:
你的土之符文将你身体的外表变形为一套强大的防护护甲，其效果等同于胸甲，保护你免受物理伤害。你的身体是一套板甲组的中型护甲，提供AC+4物品加值、敏捷上限+1、检定减值–2、速度减值–5尺、力量值16，并具有舒适特性。你永远无法穿戴其他护甲或移除这套护甲，除非你重训该专长并移除土之符文。你可以在身体上蚀刻护甲符文来补充你的土之符文，使你能够如常升级你身体的护甲。

Your earthrune transforms the outer surface of your body into a powerful protective armor as effective as a breastplate, defending you from physical harm. Your body is medium armor in the plate armor group that grants a +4 item bonus to AC, a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, a speed penalty of –5 feet, and a Strength value of 16, and has the comfort trait. You can never wear other armor or remove this armor, unless you retrain the feat and remove the earthrune. You can etch armor runes into your body to complement your earthrune, allowing you to upgrade your body’s armor as normal.

Chochori Whistlespear.name: 乔科里·哨矛 Chochori Whistlespear
Chochori Whistlespear.description:
乔科里哨音长矛是一种为水下战斗优化的沉重长矛，当它刺破波浪时会发出其标志性的哨音——这往往是许多乔科里敌人在毙命前听到的最后声音。面对骨头特别多的敌人时，长矛的侧面可以当作钝击武器使用。

乔科里哨音长矛是一把非普通的高等近战武器，属于长矛武器组，造成1d10穿刺伤害，并具有触及与多用（钝击）特性。哨音长矛经过精心设计，使得持用者在水下用它造成钝击伤害时不会承受环境减值。最后，持用者可以让长矛发出其标志性的哨音，使他们在把长矛当作管乐器演奏时，进行表演检定可以将长矛的物品加值加入其中。然而，吟游诗人无法用哨音长矛来替代材料成分。

A chochori whistlespear is a heavy spear optimized for battle underwater, which releases its namesake whistle as it pierces the waves, the last thing many a chochori’s foe ever hears before their demise. When facing particularly bony foes, the spear’s side can be used as a blunt weapon.

A chochori whistlespear is an uncommon advanced melee weapon in the spear weapon group that deals 1d10 piercing damage and has the reach and versatile bludgeoning traits. A whistlespear has been carefully designed such that the wielder doesn’t take a circumstance penalty when using it to deal bludgeoning damage underwater. Lastly, the wielder can cause the spear to produce its namesake whistle, allowing them to add the spear’s item bonus to Performance checks when using the spear to play as a wind instrument. However, a bard isn’t capable of using a whistlespear to replace material components.

Emberstaff (Major).name: 烬焰法杖（大型） Emberstaff (Major)
Emberstaff (Major).description:
这根焦黑的树枝永远闷燃着余烬，外覆一层薄薄的木炭。木炭会把任何握持它之人的手染黑，但也让法杖的持用者能够用它在纸张、石头及其他光滑表面上作画。

启动 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.aBQ8ajvEBByv45yz]{施放法术}

效果 你从法杖中消耗一定数量的充能，以施放其列表中的一个法术。

  • 戏法 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.O9w7r4BKgPogYDDe]{产生火焰}
  • 1环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{燃烧之手}
  • 2环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.23cv1p49NFd0Onng]{灰烬云}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.y6rAdMK6EFlV6U0t]{燃烧之手}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3q9tBMWsWQKlXPPJ]{火焰鬼火}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZxHC7V7HtjUsB8zH]{炽焰箭}
  • 3环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.23cv1p49NFd0Onng]{灰烬云}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KEkPxx7Sm6Xf4W3s]{炽焰俯冲}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZxHC7V7HtjUsB8zH]{炽焰箭}
  • 4环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.23cv1p49NFd0Onng]{灰烬云}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KEkPxx7Sm6Xf4W3s]{炽焰俯冲}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3q9tBMWsWQKlXPPJ]{火焰鬼火}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZxHC7V7HtjUsB8zH]{炽焰箭}
  • 5环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZxHC7V7HtjUsB8zH]{炽焰箭}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.23cv1p49NFd0Onng]{灰烬云}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KEkPxx7Sm6Xf4W3s]{炽焰俯冲}
  • 6环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kuoYff1csM5eAcAP]{火种子}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Gn5deIoobHpd3SiR]{火焰涡流}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3q9tBMWsWQKlXPPJ]{火焰鬼火}

制作需求 提供所有所列法术在所有所列环级各施放一次。

Galtzagorri Hook Spear.name: 加尔察戈里钩长矛 Galtzagorri Hook Spear
Galtzagorri Hook Spear.description:
galtzagorri钩长矛是一种末端带有三根钩状齿的长矛，让人联想到更长的三叉戟，并被设计用于缴械敌人并利用galtzagorri灵巧的移动。galzagorri钩长矛是一种不常见的军用近战武器，属于长矛武器组，造成1d6穿刺伤害，并具有缴械、灵巧、小妖精（特征）以及投掷20英尺特征。

A galtzagorri hook spear is a spear with three hooked tines at the end, reminiscent of a longer trident and built to disarm foes and take advantage of a galtzagorri’s dextrous movements. A galzagorri hook spear is an uncommon martial melee weapon in the spear weapon group that deals 1d6 piercing damage and has the disarm, finesse, sprite, and thrown 20 feet traits.

Old Woody.name: 老树精 Old Woody
Old Woody.description:
启动 1 交互

老伍迪是一种传奇佳酿，一种奇异的魔法酒精，会产生随机化的效果。其价格与口感会因酿造的年份而剧烈变化；年份不仅会改变口感，还可能使其具有与下文所列不同的效果，或使某些效果比其他效果更可能发生。有些批次的老伍迪甚至具有不同的物品等级。一杯典型批次的老伍迪若能找到，售价约为50 gp。饮用老伍迪后，掷骰[[/r 1d100]]{d100}，并应用表中所列效果。若你并非自愿饮用老伍迪，你可以尝试一次@Check[type:fortitude|dc:20]豁免以使该效果无效。饮用老伍迪后，你会在24小时内对进一步饮用老伍迪的效果暂时免疫。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.roll-tables.RollTable.HNjiGT7lPSMZuZpW]{老伍迪}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.tV10UYT8Nwi599AY]{老伍迪的传奇}

Activate 1 Interact

Old Woody is a legendary brew, a strange magical alcohol that produces randomized effects. Its price and taste vary wildly based on the year of the brew, which can not only change the taste, but also cause it to have different effects than the ones listed below, or make some of the effects more likely than others. Some brews of Old Woody even have a different item level. A single drink from a typical brew of Old Woody sells for around 50 gp, if you can find one. After drinking Old Woody, roll a [[/r 1d100]]{d100}, and apply the listed effect. If you didn’t willingly drink the Old Woody, you can attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:20] save to negate the effect. After drinking Old Woody, you are temporarily immune to the effects of further drinks of Old Woody for 24 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.roll-tables.RollTable.HNjiGT7lPSMZuZpW]{Old Woody}

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.tV10UYT8Nwi599AY]{The Legend of Old Woody}

Hardriggan Jagblade.name: 哈德里根·锯刃 Hardriggan Jagblade
Hardriggan Jagblade.description:
硬脊人锯刃是一种布满参差金属块的剑，其锯齿状刃缘旨在造成额外的痛苦与流血，缴械并刺穿敌人，以及威吓旁观者。这种设计的缺点在于结构完整性不高，过度使用时容易折断；因此，硬脊人有时每经过几场战斗就会用坏几把低质量的硬脊人锯刃。幸运的是，高质量或魔法硬脊人锯刃能够经受时代的考验。硬脊人锯刃是一种罕见的进阶近战武器，隶属于剑武器组，造成1d8劈砍伤害，并具有缴械、擒抱以及多用穿刺特征。它使用匕首的“大成功或大失败”专精效果，而非通常的剑类“大成功或大失败”专精效果。

A hardriggan jagblade is a sword with jagged chunks of metal throughout, built to cause additional pain and bleeding with its serrated edges, disarm and impale foes, and intimidate onlookers. The disadvantage with the design is that it doesn’t have high structural integrity and is prone to snapping with overuse; thus, hardriggans sometimes go through low quality hardriggan jagblades every few battles. Fortunately, high quality or magical hardriggan jagblades can pass the test of time. A hardriggan jagblade is an uncommon advanced melee weapon in the sword weapon group that deals 1d8 slashing damage and has the disarm, grapple, and versatile piercing traits. It uses the critical specialization effect for daggers instead of the usual critical specialization effect for swords.
